summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. All listed candidates are open PRs in hydrated preflight state, non-security-sensitive, and either need maintainer/product review or should simply remain open as independent work. No close, merge, fix, or label mutation is recommended.
